name: Supertokens With Mysql
tagline: An open-source authentication solution that simplifies the implementation of secure user authentication and session management for web and mobile applications
description:
An open-source authentication solution that simplifies the implementation of secure user authentication and session management for web and mobile applications

Docs: https://supertokens.com/docs/guides?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  supertokens:
    image: registry.supertokens.io/supertokens/supertokens-mysql:latest
    depends_on:
      mysql:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      - API_KEYS=${API_KEYS:-}
      - MYSQL_CONNECTION_URI=mysql://u2742cf49d9:61d57e5e00e6dbd3b1a50ec1920cc825@mysql:3306/${MYSQL_DATABASE:-supertokens}
    healthcheck:
      test: |
        bash -c 'exec 3<>/dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/3567 && echo -e "GET /hello HTTP/1.1\r\nhost: 127.0.0.1:3567\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n" >&3 && cat <&3 | grep "Hello"'
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42119:3567
  mysql:
    image: mysql:latest
    environment:
      - MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=61d57e5e00e6dbd3b1a50ec1920cc825
      - MYSQL_USER=u2742cf49d9
      - MYSQL_PASSWORD=61d57e5e00e6dbd3b1a50ec1920cc825
      - MYSQL_DATABASE=${MYSQL_DATABASE:-supertokens}
    volumes:
      - supertokens-mysql-data:/var/lib/mysql
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - mysqladmin
        - ping
        - -h
        - localhost
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  supertokens-mysql-data: null
